title: Painter's Blocks
description: Adds a bunch of freely dyeable blocks.
body:
**Painter's Blocks** adds a bunch of freely dyeable stone blocks.

*Painter's Stone* is a quite special material in the world of Minecraft. Unlike most blocks, you can dye it just like you want it. Blocks made of Painter's Stone can be crafted in a stonecutter and dyed in crafting tables.

PB also adds *swatches* that you can use to sample paint from existing blocks. You can then use the swatch to dye a single block. Coloured swatches can also be cloned by placing a dyed swatch next to a clean one in a crafting grid.

**If you have [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) installed, make sure to install [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) and the [Unofficial Sodium Biome Blending Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/unofficial-sodium-biome-blending-fix) to prevent crashes and visual issues!**

![](https://i.imgur.com/Q1nWTO9.png)

![](https://i.imgur.com/y3fn8Yd.png)
